body:
Fixes #94

## Summary
- Adds automatic light/dark theme handling with `prefers-color-scheme` and compact toolbar behavior before labels wrap.
- Adds UI language auto-detection for English, Russian, Chinese, and Hindi through a static `FormalAiI18n` browser module.
- Sends browser/user context into worker requests, memory exports, and prefilled GitHub issue reports, including locale/time-zone based location inference without requesting geolocation permission.
- Documents the Issue 94 case study, captured before/after screenshots, and reported missing `lino-i18n` runtime/API features upstream.

## Verification
- `npm run test:local -- --grep "Issue #94"` from `tests/e2e` - 5 passed.
- `npm run test:local` from `tests/e2e` - 75 passed.
- `cargo fmt --check` - passed.
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs` - passed; it still reports pre-existing near-limit warnings for `src/solver_helpers.rs` and `src/seed.rs`.
- `cargo test` - 231 passed, 69 ignored.

## Visual Evidence
![Dark Russian UI with compact toolbar](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-94-ff296a0bd279/docs/case-studies/issue-94/screenshots/after-dark-ru-980.png?raw=true)

## Upstream Note
- `lino-i18n` integration gap reported at https://github.com/link-foundation/lino-i18n/issues/1#issuecomment-4467551335
